highlights: Implements multiple arbitrage strategies (mutually exclusive, cascade mispricing, and yes/no gaps).
Separates detector/executor/client layers for clearer risk controls and live-vs-mock execution modes.
Uses real-time market feeds with safety rails (position sizing, loss limits) to manage execution risk.
impact: Improved speed and discipline of opportunity detection/execution in Polymarket-focused trading workflows.
one_liner: Automated Polymarket trading and arbitrage system for real-time detection, risk checks, and execution.
problem: Prediction-market inefficiencies are fleeting and difficult to exploit consistently with manual monitoring and execution.
solution: Built a modular trading stack with real-time detection engines, execution safeguards, and strategy-specific scanners.
title: Polymarket Trading System
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
